description: The `microsoft.dynamics365.finance.payable` connector provides APIs for accounts-payable operations in Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance. It covers vendor master data, vendor groups, vendor payment journals, purchase agreements, delivery terms, and invoice declarations.
key-features: Create, read, update, and delete vendor master records (V2 and V3)
Vendor groups and vendor payment journal headers and lines
Purchase agreements and pay-when-paid text configuration
